facebook.content:
"But you are not in the flesh but in the Spirit, if indeed the Spirit of God dwells in you. Anyone who does not have the Spirit of Christ does not belong to him."

( Romans 8:9, NIV )

This verse is not just a statement about spiritual identity – it's a declaration of authority. If the Spirit of God dwells in you, you are a citizen of the Kingdom, subject to Christ's lordship in every area of life.

instagram.content:
"All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me. Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit," Matthew 28:18-19.

What's holding you back from boldly exercising your authority in Jesus' name? Are you leveraging your influence to make disciples and spread the Kingdom?

tiktok.content:
"But he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life." - John 3:16

This isn't just a passage about salvation - it's about the Kingdom's authority over our hearts. Do you believe Jesus' sacrifice has the power to transform your life?
